entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Read Canadian history stories from the current history cycle (1800-1900). View images and reference atlases and maps to set the people and events in their time and place. Update History Charts as appropriate for student level.

This topic is included in the following course(s): History: Grades 2-3 (Canada), History: Grade 4 (Canada)

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content:
History courses are on a four-year rotation. Students should follow the current Alveary rotation.
Students in grades 2-4 will take the same course.

rows.label: Canadian History: Grades 2-4
rows.books: The Kids Book of Canadian History, The Spirit of Canada: Canada's Story in Legends, Fiction, Poems, and Songs, Laura Secord's Brave Walk, Born!: A Foal, Five Kittens and Confederation, Belle of Batoche, I Am Not a Ghost: The Canadian Pacific Railway
